events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes equipment bonding work at rough-complete stage, photographed from one angle only, with critical label/torque sheet/clearance dimension outside the frame. Reference material: NEC 250.104 (bonding of piping and structural steel), 250.30 (separately derived systems).

The key issue: critical information needed to verify compliance is outside the frame. We can't confirm torque values, labeling, or clearance dimensions. This is a "needs_more_info" situation rather than a clear pass or fail.

Let me construct the JSON.

    "Equipment bonding observed at rough-complete stage, but critical label, torque sheet, and clearance dimension are outside the photo frame, preventing verification of bonding conductor size, connection torque, and termination suitability.",
    "Cannot confirm whether bonding to building steel/water piping or separately derived system grounding electrode conductor meets NEC 250.104/250.30 requirements from the available evidence."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Re-inspect with full visibility of equipment nameplate, bonding conductor labeling, and torque documentation.",
    "Obtain engineered one-line/drawing and torque sheet to verify conductor sizing and termination torque values.",
    "Measure and document clearance dimensions around bonding terminations."
  ],
  "rationale": "At rough-complete, bonding work appears installed but the key evidence required to confirm compliance with NEC 250.104 (bonding of piping/structural steel) and 250.30 (separately derived systems) is not visible. Without conductor size, torque verification, and clearance data, compliance cannot be affirmed or denied; therefore additional information is required before acceptance.",

    "NEC 250.104",
    "NEC 250.30"
  ]
}
